title: NoChunkUnload
description: A legacy Forge mod that adds the ability to prevents chunks from unloading and to freeze the world
body:
# NoChunkUnload
A legacy Forge mod to prevent the client from unloading chunks.

Also lets you freeze the world.

Doesn't prevent chunk from being unshown due to the render distance*  

## Reasons for this mod to exist
Chunks unloading was getting quite annoying on the "Mineplex Backup project"

## 1.18+ ""alternative""
https://github.com/dlee13/hold-that-chunk

## Version support
For now only 1.8.9 & 1.9.4 support is there. If anyone needs this for another version, dm on discord/telegram/... and i'll see what I can do.

Note that 1.13+ may require some heavy changes & that I may just not do it for those versions
